<!--
  Please follow the ZenLock contribution guidelines before submitting.
  Branch name must follow: feat/<name>, fix/<name>, chore/<name>, docs/<name>, refactor/<name>
  PRs with unclear scope, missing description, or incorrect branch naming will be closed.
-->

## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do, in 1-3 lines. Focus on the "why". -->

## Type of change
<!-- Check one -->
- [ ] `feat` New feature
- [ ] `fix` Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` Code restructure (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs` Documentation only
- [ ] `chore` Build/tooling/meta

## Related issue
<!-- Link the GitHub issue this PR closes. Example: Closes #12 -->
Closes #

## Testing
<!-- How did you verify this works? List the Android version(s) tested on. -->
- [ ] Built with `./gradlew assembleDebug`
- [ ] Manually tested on device (Android version: ______)
- [ ] All existing features still work (lock start, schedule, whitelist, etc.)

## Screenshots / Screen recordings
<!-- Required for any UI change. Attach before/after if applicable. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch name follows convention: `feat/*`, `fix/*`, `chore/*`, `docs/*`, or `refactor/*`
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (e.g., `feat: add X`, `fix: resolve Y`)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or keystores committed
- [ ] No unrelated changes bundled in this PR
- [ ] Code follows existing patterns in the codebase
